response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r3c0 is cooperative and reciprocal with normal urgency; their SoC (0.30) is well below our share threshold (0.65), and our declining load permits modest 0.5 kWh transfer while maintaining self-preservation and geographic goodwill.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
